name: Conventional Commit Validation
description: Remind agent to use conventional commit format before shell operations involving git commit

then.prompt: If this shell command involves a git commit, ensure the commit message follows Conventional Commits format: type(scope): description. Valid types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore, perf, ci, build. Max 72 chars, lowercase, imperative mood, no period at end. Include ticket reference in body if applicable.
